adapters.name: wake-adapter-claude-sdk
adapters.description: Reference HarnessAdapter for Anthropic Claude SDK. First adapter built; backbone of the ABI design.

adapters.name: wake-adapter-langgraph
adapters.description: HarnessAdapter for LangGraph StateGraph + ToolNode + create_react_agent. Wraps compiled graphs via astream().

adapters.name: wake-adapter-crewai
adapters.description: HarnessAdapter for CrewAI role-based agents (Crew, Agent, Task) with native callbacks.

adapters.name: wake-adapter-pydantic-ai
adapters.description: HarnessAdapter for Pydantic AI typed agents (FunctionToolset, streaming, type-safe contracts).
